verses.text: Pasian' tungah a gingin ka kiko khia a, a hong zaktheihna dingin a gingin ka kiko hi
Ka lungkham hunin keimah in Topa ka zong hi. Zanin thu ngenin gim hetloin ka khut ka zan a, ahi zongin hehnepna ka ngah kei hi
Keimah in Pasian ka ngaihsun a, ka tautau hi. Lung ka geelgeel a, ka gim mahmah hi
A ihmulo dingin kei na hong bawl a, lungkham lua-in ka pau thei kei hi
Hun luite ka ngaihsun a, sawtpek lai-a kumte ka phawk hi
Zanthapai-in ka lungsimah ka kihoho a, lung geelgeelin thu ka kan ciangin
“Topa in hong nial paisuakin, kei tungah maipha hong piakiklo ding hiam
Ama itna kip bei paisuakin, ama thuciamte maimang suak ding hiam
Pasian in hehpihna a neih ding mangngilh khinta ahi hiam? Ama hehna in hehpihnate vukcip khin ahi hiam?” ka ci hi
Tua bang ahih leh, “Sangpenpa' hat nawnlohna pen ka khakham veina ahi hi,” ka ci hi
Topa' sepnate ka lungsimah ka phawk ding a, hun lui lai-a nangma na lamdangte ka ciamteh ding hi
Nangma nasepna khempeuh ka lungngaingai ding a, nangma sep na liante ka ngaihsunsun ding hi
Pasian aw, nangma lampi siangtho hi. Eima Pasian tawh kibangin bang pasian lian ahi hiam
Nang pen na lamdangte a bawl, minam dangte' lakah na vangliatna a langkhiasak khin Pasian na hi hi
Nangmah in na vangliatna tawh Jakob leh Josef' suante, na mite na honkhia hi
Tui in nang hong muh ciangin Pasian aw, tuite in nang hong muh ciangin a lau uh hi. Tui thukpi zong a ling hi
Meiipite in tui sungkhia-in, vante ging damdam a, nangma thaltangte mun citengah a leeng uh hi
Na vanging lianpi pingpei sungah omin, khuaphialepte in leitung taan' a, leitang linggawpin a kising damdam hi
Nangma lamlianpi tuipi tung hi a, nangma lamneute zong luiliante' tung mah ahi hi. Ahi zongin na khekhapte kimulo hi
Nangmah in Moses leh Aaron' khut tawh nangma mite tuuhon bangin na makaih hi.
